name: philips-remote
description: Remote control for Philips Smart TV (JointSpace API v1/v5/v6). Web app, PWA, and native iOS with WidgetKit.

scripts.deploy: scp server.py zloi2ff@192.168.31.73:/home/zloi2ff/philips-remote/ && scp www/index.html zloi2ff@192.168.31.73:/home/zloi2ff/philips-remote/www/ && ssh zloi2ff@192.168.31.73 'sudo systemctl restart philips-remote'

author: zloi2ff
